summary: Crystal‑clear recording with strong Jerry vocals, punchy Phil bass and a dancing Bill on drums makes this underrated show a hidden gem.
review: Both reviewers praise the exceptionally clear sound—described as crystal or real strong—with standout performances from Jerry, Phil and Bill. Minor issues are noted (a slightly soft guitar mix and occasional vocal drop‑outs in the second set), but overall the show is regarded as an underrated, high‑energy performance worth hearing.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 4‑star reviews highlight excellent musical performance and clear recording quality with only minor flaws, supporting a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as crystal/real strong and exceptionally clear; mix is generally balanced though guitar can be slightly soft and there are occasional vocal drop‑outs in the second set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific complaints about pacing; reviewers note tight, patient playing that rewards attentive listening.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals described as strong and among the best of his era; guitar tone praised though a bit soft in the mix.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass is clean, punchy and sits well in the mix.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill (Kreutzmann) is at the top of his game, dancing on the kit and providing an energetic backbone.
